_comment: Material-specific risks and mitigations for specification

cross-laminated-timber.mitigation: Ensure weather protection and proper sealing
Specify char rate calculations and intumescent coatings

glulam-beam.mitigation: Apply protective finish and ensure ventilation

concrete-insitu.mitigation: Specify test cubes and inspection regime

precast-concrete.mitigation: Specify robust sealant and drainage details

brick-masonry.mitigation: Specify low-salt bricks and proper DPC
Request sample panels before main works

zinc-cladding.mitigation: Specify pre-weathered finish if consistency needed
Detail drip edges and sacrificial surfaces

timber-cladding.mitigation: Accept natural variation or specify protective oils
Select stable species and allow for movement

curtain-wall.mitigation: Specify CWCT testing and site hose testing
Require thermal break details in specs

triple-glazing.mitigation: Coordinate frame sizing with glass supplier

green-roof.mitigation: Specify root barrier and flood testing

mineral-wool-insulation.mitigation: Ensure cavity ventilation and vapour control
Specify semi-rigid batts with friction fit

pir-insulation.mitigation: Specify aged thermal values in calculations
Check fire rating for specific use

natural-stone.mitigation: Specify appropriate sealer for stone type

acoustic-ceiling.mitigation: Specify humidity-resistant core for wet areas
Ensure tight joints and edge details

recycled-glass-mosaic.mitigation: Use movement joints and flexible adhesive systems in wet areas.
Specify epoxy or sealed grout and a cleaning plan suited to occupancy.

zellige-tiles.mitigation: Approve blended mock-ups and order full quantity from one production batch.
Use experienced installers and wider joints with agreed setting-out rules.

quartz-composite-worktop.mitigation: Require factory wet-cutting and certified dust control procedures.
Detail heat breaks and require trivets/thermal protection in user guidance.

solid-surface-worktop.risk: Visible seam movement on long runs
solid-surface-worktop.mitigation: Coordinate expansion allowances and manufacturer-approved jointing methods.
Specify maintenance protocol with periodic resurfacing rather than replacement.

linoleum-faced-joinery.mitigation: Use solid edge trims and radius details in high-traffic zones.
Specify moisture-rated substrate and adhesive systems for each room type.

fsc-mdf-joinery.mitigation: Seal all exposed edges and use moisture-resistant grade where required.
Specify commercial-grade coatings and include maintenance/recoat cycles in FM plan.

cork-wallcovering.mitigation: Use dado or guard details where trolleys and furniture contact walls.
Mock up adhesive system and use manufacturer-approved spread rates.

linen-wallcovering.mitigation: Specify lightfastness grade and include shading strategy in facade design.

linen-wallcovering.risk: Seam opening at substrate movement joints
linen-wallcovering.mitigation: Coordinate substrate prep and place seams away from stress points.

pet-felt-acoustic-panels.mitigation: Use tested proprietary fixing rails and verify substrate pull-out capacity.
Procure one lot and include approved control samples in QA process.

wood-wool-acoustic-panels.mitigation: Specify edge trims or recessed shadow-gap details where impact risk is high.

wood-wool-acoustic-panels.risk: Acoustic underperformance from poor cavity setup
wood-wool-acoustic-panels.mitigation: Coordinate backing void depth and insulation exactly to tested build-up.

veneer-wall-panels.mitigation: Book-match or sequence-match veneer packs and approve full-size samples.
Use balanced constructions and controlled indoor humidity at handover.

bio-based-microcement.mitigation: Use mesh-reinforced base coats and verify substrate movement tolerance.
Apply manufacturer system coats to tested coverage rates with sample sign-off.

recycled-plastic-furniture.risk: Surface creep or deformation near heat
recycled-plastic-furniture.mitigation: Select commercial-grade polymer blends and avoid direct heat source placement.

recycled-plastic-furniture.risk: Difficult repair if proprietary parts fail
recycled-plastic-furniture.mitigation: Specify replaceable components with documented spare-part availability.

aac-blockwork.mitigation: Coordinate movement joints and compatible thin-joint mortar strategy.
Detail weatherproof external layers and protect blocks during construction.

geopolymer-concrete.risk: Variable site familiarity with binder chemistry
geopolymer-concrete.mitigation: Prequalify contractor experience and run trial mixes before production pours.

geopolymer-concrete.risk: Early-age performance uncertainty in cold weather
geopolymer-concrete.mitigation: Confirm curing regime and temperature controls in method statements.

straw-insulation-panels.risk: Moisture accumulation in poorly detailed envelopes
straw-insulation-panels.mitigation: Use vapour-open build-up design with robust airtightness and rain control layers.

straw-insulation-panels.risk: Site damage during wet construction periods
straw-insulation-panels.mitigation: Protect panels with dry storage, phased installation, and immediate weatherproofing.

porcelain-wetroom-tiles.risk: Slip risk if wrong texture selected
porcelain-wetroom-tiles.mitigation: Specify tested wet slip resistance and verify with project mock-up.

porcelain-wetroom-tiles.risk: Grout staining in high-use wet areas
porcelain-wetroom-tiles.mitigation: Use suitable grout system and maintenance protocol aligned to occupancy.

ceramic-subway-tiles.risk: Uneven set-out around outlets and corners
ceramic-subway-tiles.mitigation: Approve full tile-setting drawing and sample panel before installation.
Detail movement joints and use compatible flexible grout where needed.

recycled-glass-splashback.mitigation: Verify heat rating and maintain required clearances to heat sources.

recycled-glass-splashback.risk: Paint delamination from poor edge sealing
recycled-glass-splashback.mitigation: Use manufacturer-approved edge protection and installation detailing.

sintered-stone-worktop.risk: Chips at cut-outs and exposed edges
sintered-stone-worktop.mitigation: Specify reinforced cut-out corners and edge profiles suited to use intensity.
Use certified handlers and lifting frames from fabrication to installation.

stainless-steel-worktop.risk: Visible scratching and denting in service
stainless-steel-worktop.mitigation: Specify gauge/thickness and brushing direction for anticipated usage.
Select appropriate stainless grade and cleaning protocol.

recycled-paper-composite-worktop.mitigation: Seal all cut edges and penetrations per manufacturer wet-area details.
Provide heat protection strategy and user guidance for hot cookware.

fsc-kitchen-cabinetry.mitigation: Specify commercial-grade hinges/runners with accessible replacement.
Use moisture-resistant carcass zones and leak-detection details.

water-resistant-bathroom-joinery.mitigation: Improve ventilation strategy and specify sealed edge detailing.
Use corrosion-resistant fixings and soft-close systems rated for wet rooms.

sanitary-ceramic-ware.risk: Fixture cracking from impact or over-tightened fixings
sanitary-ceramic-ware.mitigation: Use manufacturer torque guidance and protective handling methods.

sanitary-ceramic-ware.risk: High water use from poor specification
sanitary-ceramic-ware.mitigation: Select low-flush and certified efficient fixtures during design stage.

brushed-stainless-fixtures.mitigation: Specify removable aerators and planned descaling maintenance.
Use replaceable high-durability cartridges and provide spare-part schedule.

low-flow-shower-system.risk: User dissatisfaction from low pressure feel
low-flow-shower-system.mitigation: Specify pressure-compensated heads and test under expected network pressure.
Use anti-limescale nozzles and scheduled maintenance in FM plan.

frameless-shower-screen.risk: Glass breakage risk from impact or poor fixing
frameless-shower-screen.mitigation: Specify compliant safety glass thickness and validated fixing details.
Coordinate threshold and channel detailing with waterproofing strategy.
